meta.title: Dedicated Servers | Cloud Host
meta.description: Enterprise-grade dedicated servers with exclusive hardware, Tier-3 data centers, and 99.9% uptime SLA.

sections.headline: Ultimate Power.
sections.description: Unleash enterprise performance with raw hardware exclusivity. No noisy neighbors, no shared resources-just pure, dedicated computing power backed by a 99.9% uptime SLA.

image.alt: Next-gen dedicated server architecture with glowing blue components

sections.heading: 6 Advantages of Cloud Host Dedicated Servers
sections.description: We do not just provide hardware; we provide the architectural foundation for your digital growth without limits.

items.title: Ultimate Performance
items.description: Full access to raw CPU and RAM power without noisy neighbor interference from other users.

items.title: Stability First
items.description: Isolated resources ensure your applications remain stable even during peak traffic surges.

items.title: Maximal Security
items.description: Complete control over firewalls and security configurations to protect sensitive corporate data.

items.title: Full Root Control
items.description: Total freedom to install OS, applications, and custom kernel optimizations for your specific needs.

items.title: 99.9% Uptime SLA
items.description: Tier-3 data center infrastructure with redundant systems ensures your services stay online 24/7.

items.title: Scalable Hardware
items.description: Easily upgrade storage capacity or memory as your data and traffic requirements grow.

sections.heading: Who Needs a Dedicated Server?
sections.description: Infrastructure solutions for workloads that demand precision and speed.

items.title: Database Server
items.description: Ideal for big data processing and intensive database transactions requiring high I/O.

items.title: Game Server
items.description: Provides low latency and connection stability for thousands of real-time players.

items.title: Enterprise Apps
items.description: Run ERP, CRM, and internal corporate apps with high-level data security.

items.title: Streaming Media
items.description: Dedicated unlimited bandwidth for high-quality video and audio transmission without buffering.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Everything you need to know about our Dedicated Server solutions.

items.question: How does Dedicated Server differ from VPS?
items.answer: With VPS, you share physical hardware with other users virtually. With a Dedicated Server, you rent the entire physical hardware exclusively. There are no noisy neighbors; all CPU, RAM, and disk resources are yours alone.

items.question: Do I get full root access?
items.answer: Yes. You have full root access by default, giving you total control over the OS, software, and security configuration.

items.question: What is the typical setup time?
items.answer: Most servers are provisioned within 24 hours after payment confirmation. Custom builds may take slightly longer depending on hardware availability.

items.question: Does Cloud Host provide managed services?
items.answer: Yes. We offer managed service tiers that include OS updates, security hardening, monitoring, and proactive maintenance.

sections.heading: Ready to Scale Your Infrastructure?
sections.description: Upgrade your architecture today and experience the tangible performance difference for your digital business success.
